name: Wuxi Sunlit Science and Technology Company Limited
summary: Wuxi Sunlit Science and Technology Company Limited engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, equipment supply, installation, testing, repair, and maintenance of production lines for manufacturing steel wire products in the People's Republic of China. Its products include brass electroplating wire production lines, intermediate wire heat treatment lines, wire rod pretreatment lines, double-twist stranding machines, and wet drawing machines, as well as other machines, such as grinding mills, angle grinders, grinding machines, chemical corrosion-resistant troughs, steel wire surface induction heating diffusion equipment, and heat-treatment lead pots. The company is also involved in the trading of machinery products; and software development and software patent rights trading activities. Its products are used in various industries, including radial tire cords, bead wires, sawing wires, hose wires, precision steel wires, and others. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Wuxi, the People's Republic of China.
